intro: Hand-picked free AI tools. Every link below is verified to work and has a meaningful free tier or is 100% free. No signup walls on the listing — but some tools require an account to use.

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.description: OpenAI's flagship chatbot. Free tier with GPT-4o-mini + limited GPT-4o.

tools.name: Claude
tools.description: Anthropic's Claude. Free tier with the latest Sonnet model.

tools.name: Google Gemini
tools.description: Google's multimodal chatbot. Free 2.5 Flash + Pro previews.

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.description: AI search engine with cited sources. Free unlimited basic search.

tools.description: Fast European LLM. Free with image gen + web search.

tools.name: Microsoft Copilot
tools.description: Free GPT-4 + image generation through Microsoft.

tools.description: Free access to DeepSeek's powerful reasoning models.

tools.description: Free DALL-E 3 image generation. 15 daily boosts.

tools.description: 150 free tokens daily. SDXL, Flux, custom models.
